name: get_user_astro_profile
description: Retrieves the user's complete astrology profile including their name, sun sign, moon sign, ascendant sign, birth data, full chart calculation, and summaries of all past conversations. Call this tool IMMEDIATELY at the start of every conversation to personalize your astrological advice. Use the past_conversations field to continue where you left off.

path_params_schema.description: The Supabase auth UUID of the user whose astrology profile to retrieve
